title: The Tontatta Move Underground
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the tontatta move underground, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: King Riku! For ten billion berries...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll sell you this country!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: such a sum... this country doesn't possess that kind of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: By all rights...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I should just take over and not even give you this chance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You have until Dawn tomorrow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do not request aid from outside nations....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And don't make known to the people my existence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I, who would simply test your power as King.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And what if we should fight....!!? King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We mustn't!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "Fighting" would be worthy, but killing each other is some- thing that humans sho- old not do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The fact that dressrossa has been free of war for 800 years... is proof that we are no beasts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We will not become wild animals!! We're human!! There shall be no killing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's no time....!! SCAT-TER to every town and village!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: and gather up ten billion berries from throughout the land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: ...should you fail, this will become naught but a "nation of Pirates"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: We will lose the trust of people, for a time....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: But we only have a few hours!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: When this is all over, we will alone in good faith!! We must!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: lies and even well-inten- tioned decor- tions will not be enough to weather this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There are none in this country who could be called wealthy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You will make collections up until the deadline!! The very life of this country depends on it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: So that dress- Rosa might survive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: It's the army...but... this late at night...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Squad Captain Tank!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Gather up all the cash in the town and bring it here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: How could you... the King'll have something to say about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: This is on the King's orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: We can't explain, and there's no time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: HUR- RY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: It's no use...!! This sort of request is unthink-able.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Just trust in King Riku....!!! and bring as much as you can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Bring all your money here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: such a thing, all of a sudden...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: It's the Dender- mushi Pro-jector....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: You

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Citize- MS of dress- Rosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: It's King Riku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: I have an urgent request...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: It's so unrea- sonable that you may at first doubt what you're hearing, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Without asking for an explaina- lion... I need you to give me all the wealth of this nation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: All your money !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: I need you to lend me all of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: The King... Bowing Like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: But why are we doing this....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: And so suddenly ...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: KING!!! There's no need to bow so low!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: You must- n't!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: You're the King of this Land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: Please stop that! Raise up your head!!!

summary: The Tontatta Move Underground focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.
